_production_notes.title: ACK/NAK Handling
_production_notes.description: Rhapsody retries on NAK, routes to error queue after N failures. Configurable retry with exponential backoff.

_production_notes.title: IHE PCD-01 Profile
_production_notes.description: Patient Care Device observation — IHE standard for pulse oximetry and physiological monitoring data.

_production_notes.title: PHI Encryption
_production_notes.description: TLS 1.2+ required for HL7 messages in transit per HIPAA Security Rule. Message-level encryption at rest.

_production_notes.title: Error Queue Routing
_production_notes.description: Failed messages route to dead letter queue. Rhapsody provides error visualization, replay, and depth alerting.

_production_notes.title: Conformance Validation
_production_notes.description: HL7 message structure validation against hospital-specific conformance profiles before routing.

_production_notes.title: Batch vs Real-Time
_production_notes.description: Overnight SpO2 = batch ORU. Rhapsody also supports real-time streaming with waveform data in OBX segments.
